description_long: This is a modern, compact bullpup-style rifle with a matte black finish, designed for tactical use in urban environments. The rifle features a prominent suppressor attached to the end of a short barrel, enhancing its stealth capabilities. It has a detachable box magazine inserted behind the pistol grip, characteristic of bullpup configurations, which allows for a shorter overall length without sacrificing barrel length. The upper receiver is equipped with a full-length Picatinny rail for mounting optics or accessories, though no sighting system is currently attached. The foregrip is vertical, providing improved control during rapid fire, and the stock is integrated into the body, typical of bullpup rifles. The overall construction appears robust, with polymer and metal components for durability and reduced weight.
description: A compact, matte black bullpup rifle with an integrated suppressor, vertical foregrip, and detachable box magazine, designed for tactical urban use.
description_view_0: Side profile showing the full length of the rifle, including the suppressor, vertical foregrip, and integrated bullpup stock.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the suppressor's circular end and the alignment of the barrel and foregrip.
description_view_2: Opposite side profile, displaying the magazine, trigger, and the uninterrupted Picatinny rail along the top.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the stock and the symmetry of the rifle's design.
